subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! The way of humankind today is oppression and tyranny, savagery and sharp-clawed ferocity, and bloodthirstiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم روش نوع انسان امروز جور و ستم است و درندگی و تیزچنگی و خونخواری و
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @call to action, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @kindness to and rights of animals
